rooms.name: Coin Arch
rooms.description: A low arch under Camelot where debt marks are scratched beside saints' names.

encounter.name: Ledger Knight
encounter.win: The Ledger Knight yields a stamped token and refuses to explain why it smells of Avalon.
encounter.lose: The Ledger Knight records your face in a book that seems heavier than law.

rooms.name: Candle Court
rooms.description: Every candle here was bought with a secret. The flames lean toward anyone carrying royal steel.

recruitable.name: Candle Page
recruitable.success: The Candle Page joins you and promises to remember what everyone else forgets.
recruitable.failure: The Candle Page grins, pockets your offer, and asks for a better story.
